hero.description: I work daily with <1>Node.js</1>, <3>NestJS</3> and <5>Angular</5>, building applications from backend to frontend with a focus on quality and best practices.

about.label: Who I am
about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Fullstack Developer
about.p1: I have over 5 years of experience building full-stack web applications, working on the backend with <1>Node.js</1> and <3>NestJS</3> and on the frontend with <5>Angular</5> and <7>React</7>.
about.p2: I enjoy writing clean, well-structured code, working with <1>TypeScript</1>, building RESTful APIs and learning continuously. I currently work in the <3>Industrial IoT</3> sector, which gave me a lot of experience with real-time integrations.
about.p3: I am communicative, proactive and value teamwork. I am always looking for new challenges that help me grow as a developer.

showcase.label: Day to day
showcase.title: What I work with
showcase.description: Examples of solutions I build: IoT monitoring dashboards, real-time data visualization and geographic tracking with interactive maps.
showcase.map_subtitle: Unit locations and collection routes · Leaflet + OpenStreetMap

projects.label: What I've built
projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A selection of projects developed throughout my career, covering backend, frontend and IoT integrations.

contact.label: Let's talk
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Open to new opportunities, projects and partnerships. Feel free to reach out!
contact.name: Name
contact.success_desc: Thank you for reaching out! I'll get back to you soon.
